20th International Conference on the European Energy Market Will Be Held at KHAS on 10-12 June 2024

The 20

th

International Conference on the European Energy Market (EEM24)

will be held on 10-12 June 2024 at Kadir Has University.

Hosted by the KHAS Center for Energy and Sustainable Development (CESD)

, EEM24 has been successfully bringing together stakeholders from academia, industry and policy in Europe’s energy markets for 20 years. The conference co-chairs

CESD Director Prof. Dr. Volkan Ş. Ediger

and is jointly conducted by

Dr. Emre Çelebi from Yeditepe University.

The EEM conferences, first held in Lodz, Poland in 2004, were later held in European cities such as Warsaw, Krakow, Lisbon, Leuven, Madrid, Zagreb, Florence, Stockholm, Porto, Dresden, Lodz, Ljubljana, Stockholm and Lappeenranta.

The conferences focus on different topics in energy markets, including energy transformation, energy modeling, regulatory policies, energy efficiency and management, climate change, carbon markets, and energy justice.

Detailed information about the conference can be accessed from the link

https://eem24.khas.edu.tr/.
